category_note: Tonic spans waiting-room TV/screens (OOH-Health), Brochure Board and posters (Print), and Solus EDM (Direct Digital). Map per format below.
supply_deadline_rule_default: 5 working days prior to campaign start
supply_deadline_rule_print_brochure: By the 15th of the month prior to start date

formats.audio_spec: OP59 compliant (background music must not be higher volume than dialogue). Audio mandatory; if not provided Tonic will add from approved music library.
formats.restrictions: Tonic watermark in top-right corner — leave 211 x 151px area clear
formats.supply_deadline_rule: 5 working days prior to campaign start
best_practice_notes: Large text and short sentences (waiting-room readability)

formats.supply_deadline_rule: 5 working days prior to campaign start
5 working days prior to campaign start

formats.audio_spec: OP59 compliant. Audio mandatory; Tonic adds from approved library if not supplied.
formats.restrictions: AHTV watermark in right-hand corner — leave 211 x 151px area clear
formats.supply_deadline_rule: 5 working days prior to campaign start

formats.paper_weight: Multipage min 130gsm; single page flyers min 300gsm card
formats.bundling: Bundled in groups of 20 (rubber/paper bands, NO shrink wrap)
formats.carton_labelling: Title of artwork, quantity in box, number of boxes, contact name and address
formats.supply_deadline_rule: By the 15th of the month prior to start date

formats.carton_labelling: Title, quantity, no. of boxes, contact name and address

variants.integrated: Displayed within Brochure Board, protected by Perspex, state-wide or national, full campaign duration
variants.floating: Outside Brochure Board, not protected by Perspex, may stay up months to years at clinic's discretion

formats.supply_deadline_rule: By the 15th of the month prior to start date
By the 15th of the month prior to start date

restrictions: Videos cannot be embedded — link via thumbnail/hyperlink
Tables and graphics must be supplied as static images
If supplying full creative as document/PDF, end result may differ after email-builder optimisation
formats.supply_deadline_rule: 5 working days prior to campaign start

formats.non_standard_pack_note: Dimension and weight must be discussed and pre-approved by Tonic team
formats.carton_labelling: Title, quantity, no. of boxes, contact name and address
formats.supply_deadline_rule: By the 15th of the month prior to start date
